metadata.note: Output used as-is without manual revision or selection.

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Maria's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. Maria swept the floor carefully.

A sudden gust pushed the blue vase from the narrow kitchen windowsill. The blue vase struck the wooden table beside the open kitchen window. The wooden table shook hard and dropped the large ceramic bowl. The large ceramic bowl shattered across the polished kitchen floor.

The careless baker left the bread loaf inside the stone oven. The bread loaf burned beneath the intense heat of the stone oven. Thick smoke filled the small bakery and reached the ceiling detector. The ceiling detector sounded a loud alarm throughout the small bakery.

A loose pebble rolled beneath the front wheel on the steep path. The front wheel turned sharply toward the rocky roadside ditch. The cyclist lost balance and fell beside the rocky roadside ditch. A nearby hiker helped the cyclist stand beside the steep path.

The young carpenter struck the crooked nail with a heavy iron hammer. The crooked nail bent sideways against the thick wooden board. The thick wooden board split along a deep narrow crack. The young carpenter replaced the thick wooden board with a fresh plank.

The hungry squirrel pulled the paper bag from the wooden picnic table. The paper bag opened against the rough stone near the wooden picnic table. Roasted peanuts spilled across the dry grass beside the rough stone. The hungry squirrel gathered roasted peanuts from the dry grass.

The old radiator leaked hot water onto the tiled apartment floor. Hot water spread beneath the woven rug near the old radiator. The woven rug absorbed hot water and developed a dark stain. The tenant removed the woven rug from the tiled apartment floor.

The strong wave pushed the small fishing boat toward the hidden reef. The small fishing boat struck the hidden reef beneath the foaming water. The hidden reef tore a narrow hole through the wooden hull. Seawater entered the wooden hull and soaked the fishing equipment.

The tired waiter bumped the round tray against the crowded restaurant doorway. The round tray tilted above the crowded restaurant doorway. Four soup bowls slid from the round tray onto the floor. Hot soup splashed across the floor near the crowded restaurant doorway.

The playful puppy tugged the red scarf from the hallway coat rack. The red scarf wrapped around the narrow leg of the side table. The side table tipped and knocked the brass lamp downward. The brass lamp struck the floor and cracked the glass shade.

The gardener pulled the stubborn weed beside the young tomato plant. The stubborn weed released suddenly from the damp garden soil. The gardener struck the young tomato plant with an elbow during the movement. The young tomato plant bent against the low wooden fence.

The delivery cart rolled down the sloped driveway without the parking brake. The delivery cart struck the closed garage door near the garage. The closed garage door buckled around the central metal panel. The closed garage door trapped the delivery cart inside the garage.

The curious child opened the cage door inside the bright classroom. The cage door released the small green parakeet into the bright classroom. The small green parakeet flew toward the open classroom window. The small green parakeet escaped through the open classroom window.

The chef dropped the wet towel beside the busy kitchen counter. The wet towel landed across the smooth kitchen floor near the busy kitchen counter. The assistant stepped onto the wet towel while carrying empty plates. The assistant slipped and dropped empty plates across the smooth kitchen floor.

The heavy snow pressed against the weak branch above the garden shed. The weak branch cracked beneath the growing weight of the heavy snow. The weak branch fell onto the garden shed roof. The garden shed roof broke and exposed the stored tools.

The mechanic loosened the rusty bolt beneath the raised truck engine. The rusty bolt fell into the narrow space beside the battery. The rusty bolt touched the exposed battery terminals inside the engine compartment. Bright sparks flashed across the engine compartment near the battery.

The runner kicked the plastic bottle beside the crowded race route. The plastic bottle rolled beneath the folding barrier near the spectators. The folding barrier shifted toward the crowded race route. A race official pulled the folding barrier away from the crowded race route.

The storm knocked the tall pine tree across the mountain road. The tall pine tree blocked the entire mountain road. The bus stopped suddenly near the tall pine tree. The abrupt stop dropped luggage from the overhead racks inside the bus.

The student erased the wrong equation from the classroom whiteboard. The empty whiteboard space confused the student during the mathematics demonstration. The student wrote the incorrect answer beneath the remaining problem. The teacher corrected the incorrect answer on the classroom whiteboard.

The farmer opened the wooden gate beside the muddy cattle field. The wooden gate allowed the brown calf onto the narrow farm lane. The brown calf ran toward the vegetable garden near the farmhouse. The brown calf trampled young lettuce plants inside the vegetable garden.

The loose shoelace caught beneath the dance shoe during rehearsal. The dance shoe stopped abruptly on the polished studio floor. The dancer stumbled toward the mirrored studio wall. The dance instructor steadied the dancer beside the mirrored studio wall.

The technician connected the wrong cable behind the projector inside the conference room. The wrong cable sent no picture to the screen inside the conference room. The missing picture delayed the scheduled presentation inside the conference room. The technician replaced the wrong cable with the correct cable inside the conference room.

The camping stove tipped on the uneven ground beside the tent. The camping stove spilled boiling water onto the dry leaves. The dry leaves became wet and produced a cloud of steam. The camper moved the camping stove onto a flat stone.

The librarian stacked the heavy dictionaries on the weak wooden shelf. The weak wooden shelf bent beneath the heavy dictionaries. The weak wooden shelf broke near the central support bracket. The heavy dictionaries fell across the quiet library floor.

The orange cat chased a moth across the living room rug. The orange cat jumped onto the narrow windowsill beside the curtain. The orange cat pulled the curtain from the loose metal rod. The loose metal rod fell behind the living room sofa.

The painter leaned the tall ladder against the painted wall. The tall ladder slid across the wet paint on the painted wall. The tall ladder left two long marks through the wet paint. The painter covered two long marks with a fresh coat of paint.

The nurse placed the medicine bottle near the edge of the counter. The medicine bottle rolled from the counter onto the hard clinic floor. The medicine bottle cracked against the hard clinic floor. The nurse cleaned spilled medicine from the hard clinic floor.

The hot pan touched the plastic cutting board beside the stove. The plastic cutting board softened under the hot pan. The plastic cutting board bent across the kitchen counter. The cook discarded the plastic cutting board in the waste bin.

The drummer struck the cymbal stand during the crowded stage performance. The cymbal stand toppled toward the nearby electric guitar. The cymbal stand hit the nearby electric guitar near the bridge. A guitar string snapped across the nearby electric guitar.

The child released the bright balloon near the high auditorium ceiling. The bright balloon floated toward the rotating ceiling fan. The rotating ceiling fan struck the bright balloon with a spinning blade. The bright balloon burst above the surprised audience.

The warehouse worker pushed the overloaded cart across the uneven concrete floor. The overloaded cart lost a wheel near the storage shelves. The overloaded cart tipped toward several sealed cardboard boxes. Several sealed cardboard boxes fell and blocked the warehouse aisle.

The violinist tightened the old string beyond the safe tension limit. The old string snapped above the polished wooden violin. The old string scratched the polished wooden violin near the bridge. The violinist replaced the old string with a fresh string.

The heavy book slid from the slanted desk in the quiet study. The heavy book struck the glass ink bottle beside the slanted desk. The glass ink bottle tipped across the open notebook. Blue ink covered the open notebook with a wide stain.

The horse pulled the loose rope beside the stable doorway. The loose rope released the wooden latch on the stable doorway. The wooden latch allowed the stable door to swing outward. The horse walked through the stable door into the courtyard.

The wind lifted the paper napkin from the outdoor cafe table. The paper napkin landed against the candle flame on the neighboring cafe table. The candle flame ignited the paper napkin beside the glass holder. A waiter smothered the paper napkin with a damp cloth.

The engineer pressed the incorrect switch inside the factory control room. The incorrect switch stopped the main conveyor belt without warning. The main conveyor belt trapped several packages beneath the loading arm. The loading arm crushed several packages against the metal guide rail.

The goalkeeper kicked the wet ball toward the muddy practice field. The wet ball struck a puddle near the practice goal. Muddy water splashed across the clean uniform of the goalkeeper. The goalkeeper rinsed the clean uniform beside the equipment shed.

The fisherman pulled the tangled net against the side of the boat. The tangled net caught the metal hook near the rail of the boat. The metal hook tore through the weathered canvas cover. Rainwater entered the weathered canvas cover and soaked the stored rope.

The climber dropped the metal cup above the narrow mountain ledge. The metal cup bounced across the narrow mountain ledge. The metal cup struck the loose rock near the edge of the narrow mountain ledge. The loose rock fell into the deep valley below.

The baker poured cold cream into the hot glass mixing bowl. The hot glass mixing bowl cracked under the sudden temperature change. The hot glass mixing bowl leaked cold cream across the wooden counter. The baker wiped cold cream from the wooden counter with a towel.

The school custodian polished the hallway floor near the main staircase. The hallway floor became slippery beside the main staircase. The student stepped onto the hallway floor while carrying books. The student slipped and scattered books across the hallway floor.

The photographer placed the camera bag beside the open park fountain. A strong breeze pushed the camera bag toward the open park fountain. The camera bag fell into the open park fountain. The photographer pulled the camera bag from the open park fountain.

The plumber turned the stiff valve beneath the old kitchen sink. The stiff valve broke from the corroded water pipe. The corroded water pipe sprayed water across the kitchen cabinet. The plumber closed the main water supply outside the house.

The dog dug beneath the wooden fence beside the vegetable garden. The dog opened the narrow gap beneath the wooden fence. The dog crawled through the narrow gap into the vegetable garden. The dog crushed several cabbage plants inside the vegetable garden.

The janitor pulled the full trash bag across the rough basement floor. The rough basement floor tore the full trash bag near the lower corner. Broken glass spilled from the full trash bag onto the rough basement floor. The janitor swept broken glass into a metal dustpan.

The tailor left the hot iron against the blue cotton shirt. The hot iron scorched the blue cotton shirt near the collar. The scorch mark darkened the blue cotton shirt across the fabric. The tailor replaced the blue cotton shirt with a new shirt.

The falling apple struck the beehive beside the orchard path. The beehive rocked against the low wooden stand. Several angry bees left the beehive near the orchard path. The orchard worker ran from several angry bees toward the barn.

The actor stepped backward into the painted stage scenery during rehearsal. The painted stage scenery tilted toward the stage curtain. The painted stage scenery pulled the stage curtain from the overhead rail. The stage curtain fell across the center of the stage.

The museum visitor leaned against the unsecured display barrier. The unsecured display barrier moved toward the ancient stone statue. The unsecured display barrier struck the ancient stone statue near the base. The ancient stone statue tipped onto the padded museum floor.

The gardener left the hose across the narrow stone walkway. The delivery worker caught a boot beneath the hose. The delivery worker stumbled against the stack of empty flowerpots. The stack of empty flowerpots collapsed across the narrow stone walkway.

The squirrel dropped the acorn into the rain gutter. The acorn rolled through the rain gutter toward the downpipe. The acorn lodged inside the narrow opening of the downpipe. Rainwater overflowed the rain gutter and soaked the porch wall.

The cook poured hot oil into the damp metal skillet. Hot oil splattered from the damp metal skillet across the stove. Hot oil ignited beside the open gas flame. The cook covered the damp metal skillet with a metal lid.

The moving truck backed toward the low tree branch above the driveway. The moving truck struck the low tree branch near the driveway. The low tree branch broke across the moving truck roof. Leaves and twigs covered the moving truck roof.

The boy kicked the football toward the open greenhouse door. The football entered the greenhouse through the open greenhouse door. The football struck the tray of young seedlings. The tray of young seedlings fell from the bench inside the greenhouse.

The loose wheel rolled from the garden cart on the sloping lawn. The garden cart tilted toward the stone birdbath beside the sloping lawn. The garden cart struck the stone birdbath near the base. The stone birdbath cracked and spilled water across the sloping lawn.

The musician placed the drink beside the electronic keyboard onstage. The drink tipped against the electronic keyboard during the performance. The drink spilled sweet liquid between the electronic keyboard keys. The electronic keyboard stopped producing sound during the performance.

The kayaker struck the submerged branch beneath the narrow river channel. The submerged branch opened the small tear in the kayak. River water entered the kayak through the small tear. The kayaker paddled the kayak toward the sandy bank.

The shopkeeper stacked glass jars near the edge of the market shelf. The market shelf shook when a delivery cart struck the shelf. Glass jars slid from the market shelf onto the tile floor. Glass jars broke and scattered dried beans across the tile floor.

The dentist dropped the metal instrument beside the treatment chair. The metal instrument struck the foot control beneath the treatment chair. The foot control activated the dental drill beside the treatment chair. The dentist switched off the dental drill near the treatment chair.

The farmer parked the tractor on the muddy hillside without a brake. The tractor rolled downhill toward the wooden equipment shed. The tractor struck the wooden equipment shed near the doorway. The wall of the wooden equipment shed collapsed beside the tractor.

The child poured excess water into the small flowerpot near the window. Excess water filled the small flowerpot above the dark soil line. Excess water spilled onto the wooden windowsill beneath the small flowerpot. The wooden windowsill developed a dark stain beneath the small flowerpot.

The waiter placed the heavy pitcher on the unstable folding table. The unstable folding table tilted under the heavy pitcher. The heavy pitcher slid toward the edge of the unstable folding table. The heavy pitcher fell and dented the wooden dining floor.

The camper hung wet clothes from the weak tree branch. Wet clothes pulled the weak tree branch toward the campfire. The weak tree branch broke above the campfire. Wet clothes fell across the campfire and produced thick smoke.

The wind closed the cabin door against the metal key in the lock. The cabin door bent the metal key inside the lock. The metal key jammed inside the lock of the cabin door. The traveler called the caretaker from outside the cabin.

The mechanic raised the car with the improperly placed floor jack. The improperly placed floor jack shifted beneath the car frame. The car frame dropped onto the front tire. The front tire flattened beneath the weight of the car frame.

The child pulled the tablecloth beneath the birthday cake. The tablecloth dragged the birthday cake toward the table edge. The birthday cake fell onto the carpet beside the table. Frosting covered the carpet beneath the birthday cake.

The courier left the parcel beside the automatic lobby door. The automatic lobby door opened against the parcel. The parcel slid across the polished lobby floor. The parcel entered the elevator through the open elevator doorway.

The electrician touched the wrong wire inside the hallway switch box. The wrong wire created the short circuit inside the hallway switch box. The short circuit tripped the main breaker in the basement. The main breaker cut electricity throughout the apartment building.

The horse kicked the loose bucket beside the stable wall. The loose bucket rolled toward the stable drain. The loose bucket covered the stable drain completely. Wash water flooded the stable floor around the loose bucket.

The strong wind pulled the canvas awning above the cafe entrance. The canvas awning tore from the left metal bracket. The left metal bracket fell onto the sidewalk below. The left metal bracket cracked a paving stone on the sidewalk.

The child dropped the coin into the narrow vending machine slot. The coin jammed inside the narrow vending machine slot. The coin completely blocked the internal payment mechanism. The internal payment mechanism rejected several purchase attempts from the child.

The gardener placed fresh compost against the ventilation grate inside the greenhouse. Fresh compost blocked airflow through the ventilation grate inside the greenhouse. Warm air accumulated steadily near the roof inside the greenhouse. Several delicate orchids wilted badly near the center of the greenhouse.

The unsecured barrel rested on the flatbed truck along the bumpy country road. The unsecured barrel rolled across the flatbed truck during a sharp curve. The unsecured barrel struck the rear gate of the flatbed truck. The rear gate of the flatbed truck opened and released the unsecured barrel.

The student spilled glue across the corner of the art project. Glue stuck the art project to the classroom table. The student pulled the art project from the classroom table. The art project tore across the lower paper edge.

The model airplane rolled from the workbench onto the workshop floor. The model airplane struck the toolbox beside the workbench. The toolbox opened and scattered metal tools across the workshop floor. A craft worker collected metal tools from the workshop floor.

The goat pushed the loose barn door beside the feed room. The loose barn door struck the metal feed bin. The metal feed bin opened near the barn wall. Grain spilled from the metal feed bin across the barn floor.

The athlete threw the medicine ball toward the gymnasium wall. The medicine ball struck the wall-mounted clock above the exercise mats. The wall-mounted clock fell from the gymnasium wall. The wall-mounted clock broke against the exercise mats.

The gardener cut the support string beside the climbing bean vine. The support string released the climbing bean vine from the trellis. The climbing bean vine fell across the garden path. The gardener tied the climbing bean vine to a new support.

The factory worker filled the storage tank beyond the marked limit. The storage tank overflowed through the upper inspection opening. Chemical foam spread across the concrete factory floor. The emergency crew contained chemical foam with absorbent barriers.

The skier struck the hidden branch beneath the fresh mountain snow. The hidden branch caught the edge of the left ski. The left ski twisted away from the downhill direction. The skier fell onto the downhill slope beside the marked trail.

The cat knocked the yarn basket from the sewing room chair. The yarn basket overturned beside the sewing room chair. Several yarn balls rolled beneath the heavy cabinet. The seamstress retrieved several yarn balls with a wooden ruler.

The gardener burned dry leaves beside the open tool shed. A sudden breeze carried sparks toward the open tool shed. Sparks ignited the canvas sack inside the open tool shed. The gardener extinguished the canvas sack with a garden hose.

The bus driver closed the luggage compartment around the hanging strap. The hanging strap prevented the luggage compartment from locking completely. The luggage compartment opened along the rough country road. Two suitcases fell from the luggage compartment onto the roadside.

The chef mixed the yeast with excessively hot water inside the metal bowl. Excessively hot water killed the yeast inside the metal bowl. The yeast failed to raise the bread dough inside the metal bowl. The chef discarded the bread dough in the kitchen waste bin.

The child placed the magnet beside the mechanical wristwatch. The magnet disturbed the small gears inside the mechanical wristwatch. The mechanical wristwatch stopped near the bedroom dresser. A watchmaker repaired the mechanical wristwatch inside the repair shop.

The farmer left the irrigation pipe across the tractor path. The tractor wheel crushed the irrigation pipe near the field entrance. The irrigation pipe sprayed water across the dry soil. Water formed a muddy pool near the field entrance.

The hiker placed the heavy backpack against the rotten trail sign. The heavy backpack pushed the rotten trail sign toward the ravine. The rotten trail sign fell beyond the trail edge. The park ranger installed a new trail sign beside the ravine.

The child pushed the toy car beneath the living room cabinet. The toy car struck the power switch on the floor heater. The floor heater started beneath the hanging window curtain. The parent moved the hanging window curtain away from the floor heater.

The mechanic poured the wrong fuel into the portable generator. The wrong fuel clogged the portable generator carburetor. The portable generator stopped during the outdoor market. The vendor replaced the portable generator with a spare unit.

The baker stacked warm pies beneath the loose cooling rack. The loose cooling rack shifted above the warm pies. The loose cooling rack fell across the warm pies. The baker discarded the warm pies inside the kitchen waste bin.

The dog chased the rabbit toward the open garden gate. The rabbit crossed the road beyond the open garden gate. The dog entered the road through the open garden gate. A driver stopped the car near the dog.

The diver dropped the flashlight beside the coral reef. The flashlight struck the narrow crevice within the coral reef. The flashlight became wedged inside the narrow crevice. The diver pulled the flashlight free with a strong hand grip.

The office worker overloaded the paper tray inside the copier. The paper tray pushed several sheets against the feed roller. Several sheets jammed tightly beneath the feed roller inside the copier. The copier stopped and displayed a paper warning.

The child kicked sand against the small beach cooler. Sand entered the small beach cooler through the loose lid. Sand covered the sandwiches inside the small beach cooler. The family discarded the sandwiches near the picnic area.

The sculptor placed the clay figure beside the open studio window. Cold air entered through the open studio window near the clay figure. Cold air dried the clay figure very unevenly. The clay figure cracked across the narrow base.

The worker rolled the steel drum across the sloped loading dock. The steel drum gained speed toward the parked forklift. The steel drum struck the parked forklift near the rear wheel. The parked forklift moved against a stack of wooden pallets.

The camper left the food bag beside the low forest branch. A raccoon pulled the food bag beneath the low forest branch. The food bag tore against a sharp rock. Packaged snacks spilled widely across the damp forest ground.

The cleaner sprayed water near the electrical outlet in the hallway. Water entered the electrical outlet through a cracked cover. The electrical outlet sparked beside the wet wall in the hallway. The building manager switched off power to the hallway.

The passenger placed the suitcase against the emergency train door. The suitcase blocked the emergency train door from closing fully. A warning signal sounded inside the train carriage. The conductor moved the suitcase away from the emergency train door.

The gardener rolled the stone planter toward the sloped patio edge. The stone planter slipped from the wet gloves of the gardener. The stone planter fell onto the lower garden path. The stone planter broke and released soil across the lower garden path.

A local farmer sold purple carrots at the riverside farmers market. A young violinist performed a cheerful folk melody at the riverside farmers market. A visiting chef sampled creamy goat cheese at the riverside farmers market. An experienced florist arranged bright sunflowers at the riverside farmers market.

A marine biologist measured a sea turtle at the coastal aquarium. A schoolchild sketched a silver shark at the coastal aquarium. A technician cleaned a circular tank window at the coastal aquarium. A musician played soft cello music inside the coastal aquarium.
